2603.14259.title: Bringing Model Editing to Generative Recommendation in Cold-Start Scenarios
2603.14259.paper_summary: Generative recommendation (GR) has shown strong potential for sequential recommendation in an end-to-end generation paradigm. However, existing GR models suffer from severe cold-start collapse: their recommendation accuracy on cold-start items can drop to near zero. Current solutions typically rely on retraining with cold-start interactions, which is hindered by sparse feedback, high computational cost, and delayed updates, limiting practical utility in rapidly evolving recommendation catalogs. Inspired by model editing in NLP, which enables training-free knowledge injection into large language models, we explore how to bring this paradigm to generative recommendation. This, however, faces two key challenges: GR lacks the explicit subject-object binding common in natural language, making targeted edits difficult; and GR does not exhibit stable token co-occurrence patterns, making the injection of multi-token item representations unreliable. To address these challenges, we propose GenRecEdit, a model editing framework tailored for generative recommendation. GenRecEdit explicitly models the relationship between the full sequence context and next-token generation, adopts iterative token-level editing to inject multi-token item representations, and introduces a one-to-one trigger mechanism to reduce interference among multiple edits during inference. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets show that GenRecEdit substantially improves recommendation performance on cold-start items while preserving the model's original recommendation quality. Moreover, it achieves these gains using only about 9.5% of the training time required for retraining, enabling more efficient and frequent model updates.
2603.14259.paper_summary_zh: 生成推薦（GR）在端到端生成範式中的序列推薦展現出強大的潛力。<lb/>然而，現有的GR模型面臨嚴重的冷啟動崩潰：它們對冷啟動項目的推薦準確性可能降至接近零。<lb/>目前的解決方案通常依賴於使用冷啟動互動進行重新訓練，但這受到稀疏反饋、高計算成本和延遲更新的限制，限制了在快速變化的推薦目錄中的實際效用。<lb/>受到NLP中模型編輯的啟發，該技術使得無需訓練即可將知識注入大型語言模型，我們探索如何將這一範式引入生成推薦。<lb/>然而，這面臨兩個主要挑戰：GR缺乏自然語言中常見的明確主題-對象綁定，使得有針對性的編輯變得困難；而且GR並不顯示穩定的標記共現模式，使得多標記項目表示的注入不可靠。<lb/>為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了GenRecEdit，一個專為生成推薦量身定制的模型編輯框架。<lb/>GenRecEdit明確建模全序列上下文與下一標記生成之間的關係，採用迭代的標記級編輯來注入多標記項目表示，並引入一對一觸發機制以減少推理過程中多次編輯之間的干擾。<lb/>在多個數據集上的廣泛實驗表明，GenRecEdit顯著提高了對冷啟動項目的推薦性能，同時保持了模型原有的推薦質量。<lb/>此外，它僅使用約9.5%的重新訓練所需的訓練時間就實現了這些增益，使得模型更新更加高效和頻繁。
2603.14259.author: Chenglei Shen et.al.
2603.14259.authors: Chenglei Shen, Teng Shi, Weijie Yu, Xiao Zhang, Jun Xu
